pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java from 8.78.0 to 8.78.1 in the openrewrite group
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 1 update: [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite). Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.78.0 to 8.78.1
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.78.1

What's Changed

  • Fix NumberFormatException in version comparison for versions with 6+ numeric parts by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7207
  • Scala parser: enum support, wildcard import preservation, intersection types by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7203
  • Fix build cache determinism for reproducible builds by @​ribafish in openrewrite/rewrite#7173
  • Fix build cache determinism for rewrite-go goBuild task by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7214
  • C#: Add MSBuildProject/DotNetProject RPC codecs and Parse handler by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7156
  • Add GitIgnore utility for gitignored-and-untracked checks by @​pdelagrave in openrewrite/rewrite#7215
  • Allow null Properties to skip YAML placeholder resolution by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7200
  • C#: Exclude git-ignored files from SolutionParser results by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7181
  • Support changing properties in Maven profiles by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#7031
  • Add SyncGradleExtPropertiesWithBom recipe by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6958
  • C#: Add documentation comment LST infrastructure by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7015
  • Skip redundant property override in child when parent declares same dependency by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6955
  • Add recipes which sort dependency declarations in Gradle and Maven by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#7217
  • Fix AddProperty skipping property when child POM has relativePath by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6943
  • Add ParseError support to rewrite-go parser and RPC by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7218
  • Handle directory-style relativePath in getParentWithinProject by @​kmccarp in openrewrite/rewrite#7223
  • Python: Populate declaring type on function declarations by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7221
  • Rewrite encoding detection as inverted UTF-8 validator by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#7213
  • Fix parsing of dockerfiles which contain $ and escaped " characters by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#7224
  • Replace ThreadLocal with cursor-based accumulator in DeclarativeRecipe by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7225
  • Use JavaTemplate.apply() static method by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7219

New Contributors

  • @​ribafish made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite#7173

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.78.0...v8.78.1

Commits
  • bb1e273 Use JavaTemplate.apply() static method (#7219)
  • e3a8798 Replace ThreadLocal accumulator with cursor-based lookup in DeclarativeRecipe...
  • 4032a63 Fix dockerfile parsing issue (#7224)
  • bdb64b5 Rewrite encoding detection as inverted UTF-8 validator (#7213)
  • 77eea15 Python: Populate declaring type on function declarations from ty-types descri...
  • 9f84dc2 Handle directory-style relativePath in getParentWithinProject (#7223)
  • 2f29beb Add ParseError support to rewrite-go parser and RPC (#7218)
  • 7af5bf7 Fix AddProperty skipping property addition when child POM has relativePath (#...
  • 5bc2bf9 Add recipes which sort dependency declarations in Gradle and Maven (#7217)
  • 06c5655 Scala: add ScalaTemplateRecipe base class for before/after template recipes
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=org.openrewrite:rewrite-java&package-manager=maven&previous-version=8.78.0&new-version=8.78.1)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) You can trigger a rebase of this PR by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore major version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's major version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's major version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore minor version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's minor version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's minor version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore ` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency (unless you unignore this specific dependency or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove the ignore condition of the specified dependency and ignore conditions
